text:
There once was a young frog who lived on a lily pad. This frog dreamt about becoming a prince. He never stopped dreaming. He would spend his mornings singing whimsical songs into a crystal clear pond.

One day, while hopping from pad to pad, he heard a sweet melody. He floated closer and discovered it was a bird, a female hummingbird. She was perched, singing, and seemed quite taken with him.

The frog thought his dream was coming true. He began serenading her every morning. However, she didn't seem very interested in him. One day, she flew away. The frog lay upon his pad, looking like a statue.

Days turned into weeks. The frog stopped dreaming. One morning, when no one was around, he tried singing again. This time, the song was different. It had the power to enchant everyone nearby, stirring dreams and fluttering memories back to life.

Years passed. The frog became plishtically old, but
